payload.text_excerpt: The Ariete Stiromatic 6257 is a high-performance steam iron designed to deliver
payload.text:
The Ariete Stiromatic 6257 is a high-performance steam iron designed to deliver professional ironing results at home. As a steam generator type, it boasts a robust 2000W power output, ensuring rapid heat-up and consistent steam production. The iron features a boiler pressure of 3 bar, facilitating a powerful steam rate of up to 80g/min, which effectively tackles stubborn creases across a variety of fabrics. Its 0.8L boiler capacity (equivalent to 800ml) allows for extended ironing sessions without frequent refills.

Equipped with an aluminium soleplate, the AR-6257 ensures smooth gliding and even heat distribution for optimal ironing performance. The design prioritizes user comfort and functionality, incorporating a professional cork handle for a comfortable and non-slip grip during prolonged use. Key features include a single boiler/iron ignition button, a continuous steam function for uninterrupted ironing, and vertical ironing capability, making it suitable for refreshing hanging garments. Safety and convenience are further enhanced by a thermostat control light, steam ready light, an end of water warning light, and a protective safety cap.

payload.text_excerpt: The Ariete Stiromatic 6257 is a powerful steam iron designed for efficient and p
payload.text:
The Ariete Stiromatic 6257 is a powerful steam iron designed for efficient and professional garment care. Operating at 2000W, this steam generator iron delivers a continuous steam rate of up to 80g/min, supported by a 3 bar boiler pressure and a 0.8L water tank capacity. Its aluminium soleplate ensures smooth gliding across various fabrics, while features like continuous steam function and vertical ironing capability make it versatile for different garment types, including hanging clothes.

Engineered for user comfort and safety, the AR-6257 features a professional cork handle for a secure grip and includes essential indicators such as a thermostat control light, steam ready light, and an end of water warning light. A safety cap is also integrated for secure operation. This model is an ideal solution for those seeking a robust and feature-rich steam iron for comprehensive home ironing needs.
